name: Potroasted Kid, Locarno Style (Capretto Alla Locarnese)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat into bite-sized pieces and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
2. Heat butter in a casserole until melted, then add sage, juniper berries, mint, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
3. Cook, stirring constantly, for 3 minutes.
4. Add the meat and brown on all sides.
5. Lower heat and add wine. Simmer, covered, until meat is tender (about an hour with kid).
6. Remove meat and keep warm. Strain sauce.
7. Return sauce to casserole and stir in cream and rum. Bring to boil and reduce to heavy cream consistency.
8. Add meat back to sauce and heat through.
9. Serve with dry boiled rice and green peas (or wide homemade egg noodles).
